title: More Countries Jump on the Social Media Ban Wagon
summary: Age restrictions on accounts may be more of a ban(d) aid, because industry compliance is already falling short. Tech giants are struggling to follow the laws without affecting users.
imageAlt: More Countries Jump on the Social Media Ban Wagon
